pr.title: feat: AI Video Generator web app with LTX-2, Wan 2.2, and Mochi 1
pr.body:
## Summary

Full-stack AI Video Generator web app built with Next.js (App Router), Tailwind CSS, and TypeScript. Supports text-to-video generation via multiple open-source AI models:

- **LTX-2 Distilled** (Lightricks) - First open-source audio-video model, generates 1080p with synchronized sound
- **Wan 2.2 Fast** (Alibaba) - Fast text-to-video at ~30s generation, $0.05/video
- **Mochi 1** (Genmo) - 10B param model with high-fidelity motion
- **Wan 2.7** (via fal.ai) - Latest Wan model with audio support

**Key features:**
- Dark-themed, responsive UI with model selection, provider switching, and advanced options (aspect ratio, duration, negative prompts)
- Model badges showing key capabilities (Audio + Video, Fast & Cheap, High Fidelity)
- Async video generation with polling-based status tracking
- Video gallery with playback, download, and history management
- API keys stored locally in browser (never sent to our servers)
- Supports both Replicate and fal.ai as inference providers

![AI Video Generator UI](https://app.devin.ai/api/presigned_proxy?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..2q_WJMCTKtcvV1P5bFKy9Dl_2rPWgU-ZJUct7aQfRKg)

## Review & Testing Checklist for Human

- [ ] Run `npm install && npm run dev` and verify the app starts at http://localhost:3000
- [ ] Add a Replicate API key in Settings and generate a video with each model (LTX-2, Wan 2.2, Mochi 1)
- [ ] Verify video playback and download work after generation completes
- [ ] Test that API keys persist across page refreshes (stored in localStorage)
- [ ] Try switching between Replicate and fal.ai providers

### Notes

- This is a new Next.js application pushed to the existing repo since I couldn't create a new repository with the current GitHub integration. You may want to create a dedicated `ai-video-generator` repo for this.
- Video generation typically takes 30s-3min depending on the model. LTX-2 and Wan 2.2 Fast are the quickest.
- You'll need a Replicate API token (free tier available at https://replicate.com/account/api-tokens) or fal.ai key to test generation.

Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/461df51896c84c76ad3b282bacc545df
Requested by: @imangadzhi186
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
